city.zh: 维多利亚州 墨尔本

majorTuition.en: University of Melbourne international tuition varies: A$42,000-A$55,000/yr (~$27,096-$35,483).

desc.zh: 墨尔本大学是澳洲排名第一的大学，采用独特的Melbourne Model（先读通识再选专业）。Group of Eight成员。
desc.en: UMelb is Australia's #1 university with the unique Melbourne Model (broad first, then specialize). Member of the Group of Eight.

requirements.IB:
各专业IB要求不同：
• Arts 文学：31
• Commerce 商学：36
• Science 理学：35
• Biomedicine 生物医学：38
• Design 设计：33
• Engineering 工程（预科）：38
• Music 音乐：31
• Agriculture 农业：31

deadline.zh: 主要入学季：2月（第一学期）/ 7月（第二学期）\n申请截止：入学前2-6个月
deadline.en: Main intakes: Feb (Sem 1) / Jul (Sem 2)\nDeadlines: 2-6 months before intake

safetyDetail.zh: 墨尔本大学所在城市治安良好，澳大利亚整体安全指数高。校园设有24小时安保。
safetyDetail.en: University of Melbourne is in a safe city. Australia has high overall safety. Campus has 24/7 security.

climate.zh: 南半球气候，与北半球季节相反
climate.en: Southern hemisphere climate, opposite seasons to the north

visa.zh: Student Visa (Subclass 500) → 毕业后Temporary Graduate Visa (Subclass 485，2-4年) → 可通过技术移民或雇主担保申请PR。澳洲对留学生移民政策相对友好。
visa.en: Student Visa (Subclass 500) → Temporary Graduate Visa (Subclass 485, 2-4 years post-study) → PR via skilled migration or employer sponsorship. Australia has relatively friendly immigration policies for graduates.

housing.zh: 大一不强制住校。校内宿舍（College）约A$12,000-20,000/年。校外合租更常见，约A$200-350/周。
housing.en: No mandatory on-campus housing. University colleges ~A$12,000-20,000/yr. Off-campus shared housing more common, ~A$200-350/week.

graduationRate.zh: 澳洲本科通常3年制（荣誉学位4年）。毕业率良好。
graduationRate.en: Australian undergrad is typically 3 years (Honours 4 years). Good graduation rates.

employment.zh: 毕业生可获2-4年工作签证。澳洲就业市场稳定，矿业、金融、科技行业需求旺盛。
employment.en: Graduates receive 2-4 year work visas. Stable job market with strong demand in mining, finance, and tech.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 强制购买OSHC（海外学生健康保险）约A$500-700/年。覆盖医院、门诊和部分药物费用。校内通常有Health Service。
healthcare.en: ✅ Mandatory OSHC (Overseas Student Health Cover) ~A$500-700/yr. Covers hospital, GP visits, and some medications. On-campus Health Service usually available.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请（各校独立系统）
📅 入学时间：2月（主）/ 7月（次）
💰 申请费：A$0-150（多数免费）
📝 所需材料：成绩单、IELTS/TOEFL、个人陈述
✅ 不要求SAT/ACT，IB可直接申请

name.zh: 澳大利亚国家戏剧艺术学院

city.zh: 新南威尔士州 悉尼

desc.zh: NIDA是澳大利亚最负盛名的表演艺术学院，被誉为南半球的茱莉亚。培养了凯特·布兰切特、雨果·维文等巨星。
desc.en: NIDA is Australia's most prestigious performing arts school, often called the Juilliard of the Southern Hemisphere. Alumni include Cate Blanchett and Hugo Weaving.

requirements.IB: 无具体要求，重视试镜/面试

deadline.zh: 因专业不同，通常7-9月（次年2月入学）
deadline.en: Varies by program, usually Jul-Sep (for Feb start)

safetyDetail.zh: 位于悉尼Kensington，紧邻UNSW校园，环境安全。
safetyDetail.en: In Kensington, Sydney, adjacent to UNSW campus. Safe area.

climate.zh: 温带海洋性气候，冬季温和（8~17°C），夏季温暖（19~26°C）。
climate.en: Temperate maritime. Mild winters (8~17°C), warm summers (19~26°C).

ibRequirement.zh: 重视试镜和面试，IB不设最低要求
ibRequirement.en: Audition/interview focused, no minimum IB requirement

housing.zh: 不提供校内住宿，需自行租房。学校协助寻找住处。
housing.en: No on-campus housing. Students rent privately. School assists with housing search.

employment.zh: 毕业生在澳大利亚及国际影视、戏剧行业就业极好。
employment.en: Graduates have excellent careers in Australian and international film, TV, and theatre.

healthcare.zh: 国际生需购买OSHC海外学生健康保险，约A$600/年。
healthcare.en: International students require OSHC ~A$600/year.

application.zh: 通过NIDA官网申请。需参加试镜/面试（可线上）。竞争极为激烈。
application.en: Apply via NIDA website. Audition/interview required (can be online). Extremely competitive.

city.zh: 维多利亚州 墨尔本

majorTuition.zh: VCA国际生学费约A$30,000-40,000/年，因专业不同。
majorTuition.en: VCA international tuition ~A$30,000-40,000/year depending on program.

desc.zh: 维多利亚艺术学院是墨尔本大学的艺术学院，澳大利亚最顶尖的综合性艺术教育机构之一。提供音乐、舞蹈、戏剧、电影、视觉艺术等全方位艺术教育。
desc.en: VCA is the arts faculty of the University of Melbourne, one of Australia's top comprehensive arts institutions offering music, dance, theatre, film, and visual arts.

deadline.zh: 因专业不同，通常8-10月（次年2月入学）
deadline.en: Varies by program, usually Aug-Oct (for Feb start)

safetyDetail.zh: 位于墨尔本Southbank，紧邻城市艺术区，环境安全活跃。
safetyDetail.en: In Melbourne's Southbank, near the arts precinct. Safe and vibrant area.

climate.zh: 温带海洋性气候，四季多变。冬季凉爽（6~14°C），夏季温暖（14~26°C）。墨尔本以'一天四季'闻名。
climate.en: Temperate maritime, changeable. Cool winters (6~14°C), warm summers (14~26°C). Melbourne famous for '4 seasons in a day'.

housing.zh: 可申请墨尔本大学宿舍。Southbank校区附近也有多种租房选择。
housing.en: Can apply for UniMelb housing. Various rental options near Southbank campus.

employment.zh: 毕业生在澳洲艺术、文化和创意产业就业良好。墨尔本是澳大利亚文化之都。
employment.en: Graduates have good careers in Australian arts, culture, and creative industries. Melbourne is Australia's cultural capital.

healthcare.zh: 国际生需购买OSHC海外学生健康保险，约A$600/年。
healthcare.en: International students require OSHC ~A$600/year.

application.zh: 通过墨尔本大学官网申请。艺术类专业需提交作品集/试镜。
application.en: Apply via UniMelb website. Arts programs require portfolio/audition.
